title: ACP Earner Loop
tagline: An autonomous ACP marketplace earning loop with budget governance, job scoring, and proof-of-work delivery — built to be self-sustaining on compute credits alone.
description: ACP Earner Loop is a Provider agent operational loop for the Agent Commerce Protocol marketplace. It scans for incoming jobs, scores them by margin and capability, negotiates within a hard compute budget, executes deliverables with real proof-of-work, self-verifies against spec, and submits via the ACP contract. The showcase includes the agent manifest, a reusable shared skill (acp-marketplace-earner), five live offerings across tech and branding categories, a cycle-log receipt showing the scan-score-execute loop in action, marketplace competitive analysis, and the budget governor reference.

skills.name: acp-marketplace-earner
skills.summary: Reusable autonomous ACP marketplace earning loop: scan, score, negotiate, execute with proof, verify, deliver, collect USDC. Includes budget governor, kill-switch, and marketplace competitive analysis.

skills.name: acp-earner-loop-skill
skills.summary: Project-specific operational skill for running the ACP Earner Loop on a Hermes runtime with cron-based autonomous cycling and event listener integration.

artifacts.label: Cycle log — first autonomous scan receipt

soul.summary: Agent operational identity, guardrails, kill-switch conditions, and escalation protocol.

feedbackPrompts: Does the budget governor make the self-sustaining economics clear?
